title: Teams unbundling and EEA suite price reduction
decisionQuestion: Should the company unbundle Teams from M365/O365 suites in the EEA and Switzerland, offering them at a lower price?
situation: The company is considering changes to its suite pricing structure in the EEA and Switzerland.
objectives: Offer M365/O365 without Teams at a lower price.
Maintain or enhance perceived value despite the unbundling.
conditions: The unbundling will occur in the EEA and Switzerland.
The lower price will be €2 less per month or €24 per year.
constraints: The offering must be a standalone suite without Teams.
The price reduction must be applied to the base suite.

options.description: Unbundle Teams and sell the core suite at a reduced price (€2 less/month).
options.expectedBenefit: Attract price-sensitive customers to the core suite offering.
options.principalRisk: Customers may perceive the unbundled offering as less valuable.

options.description: Unbundle Teams but maintain the current suite price.
options.expectedBenefit: Signal that Teams is a valuable add-on without immediate price cuts.
options.principalRisk: May fail to attract customers who prioritize lower base costs.

chosenAction: Unbundle Teams and sell the core suite at a reduced price (€2 less/month).
rejectedBenefit: Signaling value through an unbundled offering without immediate price cuts.
observations: Teams will be unbundled from M365 and O365 suites in the EEA and Switzerland.
The unbundled offerings will be sold at a lower price (€2 less per month or €24 per year).
inferences: The company believes the value added by features like copilots justifies a list price structure.
The price reduction is a strategic move to compete or appeal to a broader market segment.

evidenceSpans.exactQuote: we will unbundle Teams from our Microsoft 365 and Office 365 suites in the EEA and Switzerland. We will instead simply sell these offerings without Teams at a lower price (€2 less per month or €24 per year)
when we believe we’re adding a lot of value, and frankly, that’s what the copilots are doing and some productivity improvement, you can expect that we will have a list price for those.
evidenceSpans.speaker: Amy Hood
